events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Former Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Ringo's Beat
angles.copy: Happy 86th to the legendary Ringo Starr! What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his unmistakable drumming?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! What's the Queen riff that always gets you?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Still Got the Moves
angles.copy: 83 years young and still rocking! Happy Birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger. What's your favourite Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched in the US on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first-ever music video.

angles.name: MTV Changed Everything
angles.copy: 45 years since MTV first hit screens, changing the music landscape forever! What was the first music video you remember seeing?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their groundbreaking debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, which became the fastest-selling debut album in British history at the time.

angles.name: Definitely Iconic
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'! Which track from this Britpop masterpiece is still on repeat for you?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, '3 Days of Peace & Music,' kicked off on August 15, 1969, attracting over 400,000 people to a dairy farm in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago today, the iconic Woodstock Festival began. If you could have been there for one performance, who would it have been?

events.title: 49 years since the death of Elvis Presley
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the world lost the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away on August 16, 1977, at the age of 42.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley, who passed away 49 years ago today. His legacy as the King of Rock and Roll lives on.

events.title: 30 years since the death of Tupac Shakur
events.blurb: Legendary rapper Tupac Shakur was shot on September 7, 1996, in Las Vegas, and tragically died from his injuries on September 13, 1996, at the age of 25.

angles.name: Remembering Tupac
angles.copy: Today marks 30 years since the passing of an undeniable icon, Tupac Shakur. His music and message continue to resonate globally.

events.title: 56 years since the death of Jimi Hendrix
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who died on September 18, 1970, at the age of 27.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix, who left us 56 years ago today. His guitar mastery remains unmatched.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles' eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', was released on September 26, 1969, in the UK, becoming one of their most iconic and influential works.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most recognisable in music history. What's your top track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' lead singer and songwriter Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Power
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Her distinctive voice and songwriting have graced us with so many classics.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Former Oasis frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your favourite tune from the iconic Oasis frontman?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' turns 55
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released in the US on October 11, 1971, becoming a timeless anthem for peace.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon released 'Imagine', a song that still inspires millions around the world. A true masterpiece.

events.title: The first iPod was released 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, and it began shipping on November 10, 2001, revolutionising how we listen to music.

angles.name: Music in Your Pocket
angles.copy: Can you believe it's 25 years since the first iPod changed how we carried our music? How many songs did you cram onto yours?

events.title: It's James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic themes to thrilling action, who's your favourite 007 and what's their best movie?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles co-founder, singer, and songwriter John Lennon.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message of peace continue to resonate globally.
